name: auditlanes
description: Run an agent-assisted multi-lane codebase audit workflow with structured reports and reducer state.

interface.longDescription: Coordinates calibrated audit lanes, structured JSON sidecars, reducer state, and final audit reports. Security is the stable bundled profile; other profiles are metadata or planned.
defaultPrompt: Run an AuditLanes security audit for this repo.
Show the available AuditLanes audit profiles for this repo.
